evidence_quotes.quote: Video games and other media are a PRODUCT, not a ticket for SERVICE.
I would love for my games to be playable, if i own them.
Buying a licence through a real world CD, which can expire is just stupid and wasteful for our world.

paragraphs.text: As a person who lived and made his memories in the digital world, Im saddened by what it turned it to be. Corporations are hunting for margins by whatever means and it destroys consumer trust. Data colection is one thing, making it easy for children to come in contact with gambling is another and there are many more examples. I would love for the internet to not be filled with AI bots but real people. I would love for my games to be playable, if i own them. Buying a licence through a real world CD, which can expire is just stupid and wasteful for our world. Video games and other media are a PRODUCT, not a ticket for SERVICE. Thank you Hynek Spacek
